data.body:
## Spike Results: UserPromptSubmit Hook Reliability

### Unit Test Results
- All 6 test cases pass (12 assertions)
- Hook correctly matches /fix-bug and /dso:fix-bug patterns
- Hook correctly rejects non-matching messages and bare fix-bug substring

### E2E Validation Method
- Unit tests verify script behavior only (stdin → stdout)
- Full E2E verification requires manual test in live Claude Code session
- Payload field name confirmed as 'prompt' from Claude Code docs

### Pass/Fail
- PASS (unit level) — script behavior is correct
- PENDING (E2E level) — requires manual verification in live session

### Recommendation for story 65ad-b88a
- Proceed with plugin.json registration as primary path
- If E2E testing reveals unreliability, fall back to .claude/settings.local.json via /dso:project-setup
